matrix_controls: Wave 6 maps MVP documents to standards applicability and citation boundaries only.
Document-level traceability is allowed where source limitations remain visible.
Wave 6 does not verify public regulatory meaning, embed standards text, implement retrieval, or claim audit-ready output.
Pending, TBD, reference, and user-provided standards limitations must remain visible.
